# NovaTech Solutions
Annual Report
2024

|  REVENUE | NET PROFIT | CUSTOMERS | EMPLOYEES  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  $84.2M | $12.7M | 4,310 | 620  |
|  ▲ 18% YoY | ▲ 24% YoY | ▲ 31% YoY | ▲ 12% YoY  |

nodes.title: Message from the CEO
nodes.text:
## Message from the CEO

2024 was a landmark year for NovaTech Solutions. We achieved record revenue of $84.2 million, expanded our customer base by 31%, and successfully launched two flagship AI-powered products that are already transforming how enterprises manage their operations.

Our disciplined approach to product development, combined with a relentless focus on customer success, has cemented our position as a trusted technology partner. Looking ahead, we will continue to invest heavily in research, talent, and strategic partnerships.

"Innovation is not a department — it is a mindset that every NovaTech employee carries into work every single day."

— Sarah Mitchell, Chief Executive Officer

© 2024 NovaTech Solutions Ltd. - Annual Report 2024

NOVATECH SOLUTIONS
ANNUAL REPORT 2024

nodes.title: Financial Highlights
nodes.text:
## Financial Highlights

The table below summarises our key financial results across the past three fiscal years, reflecting consistent growth in all major metrics.

|  Metric | FY 2022 | FY 2023 | FY 2024 | YoY Change  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  Revenue | $60.8M | $71.4M | $84.2M | +18%  |
|  Gross Profit | $28.1M | $34.6M | $42.5M | +23%  |
|  Operating Profit | $10.2M | $13.1M | $17.0M | +30%  |
|  Net Profit | $7.8M | $10.2M | $12.7M | +24%  |
|  R&D Spend | $5.5M | $7.1M | $9.8M | +38%  |

nodes.text:

|  Professional Services | $18.6M | 22% | +5%  |
